---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What you want

A direct description of the feature.

## Why

The problem it solves. If it relates to a neurotype-specific workflow, please say so — that affects how we review.

## How you imagine it working

A user story or interaction sketch.

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried or thought about?

## Notes

Anything else relevant — references to prior art, related projects, etc.
